title: Version 2 Candidate-Chain Binding
description: A version 2 binding catalog using ordered candidate chains with retry policy. Each binding maps a binding id to an ordered array of candidates that the resolver walks first-match-wins.

frontier.notes: Frontier class with operator-ordered fallback chain

resolutionStrategy: first-match-wins: the resolver walks candidates in order and stops at the first one whose compliance status is 'resolved' or 'warn' (depending on fallbackPolicy.onUnavailable).
retrySemantics: retryPolicy.attemptsPerCandidate controls how many times each candidate is retried before moving to the next. Absent = one attempt per candidate.
notes: Version 2 catalogs may also contain legacy single-model bindings (model + declaredCapabilities without a candidates array); these are normalized to a single-candidate chain.
